response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong general engineering fundamentals with 20 years of experience across multiple platforms and proven ability to build systems at scale (millions of requests/transactions), this role requires deep expertise in growth and experimentation systems that is essentially absent from the resume. There is no evidence of experimentation platform design, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging systems, telemetry instrumentation, metrics analysis, or statistical analysis of experiments—all core competencies for this Principal role. The candidate would require significant domain ramp-up and lacks the specific growth/measurement systems expertise the role demands.
strengths: Extensive scale experience: handled millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby and millions of transactions at Optilyz, demonstrating ability to architect high-volume systems

Remarkable technical breadth across 20 years: full-stack capability (web, mobile, desktop, embedded, infrastructure) with proficiency in required languages (JavaScript/TypeScript, C++, C#, Java, Python)
Current AI infrastructure work at re:cinq shows ability to build foundational developer tools and frameworks that enable teams
concerns: No experimentation platform or feature-flagging system experience: the resume contains zero mention of A/B testing, experiment design, rollout management, or experimentation frameworks—all central to this role

Missing data science and metrics expertise: no evidence of telemetry instrumentation, metrics analysis, statistical methods, bias detection, or experimental analysis despite being a required qualification

Generalist engineer rather than growth systems specialist: career shows full-stack engineering focus rather than deep domain expertise in measurement, growth, or experimentation platforms needed for IC6 principal role

key_factors.factor: Missing metrics, telemetry, and data analysis background
Proven ability to architect systems handling millions of scale events
